commentAndScoreViewer.alreadyScoredByOthers: This item has already been scored by the required number of annotators
commentAndScoreViewer.beingReviewedByOther: This item is currently being reviewed by another annotator

completionView.allAnnotationsComplete: All annotations in this queue are complete. Your feedback has been saved and will help improve our AI models.

getStartedView.invitedToReview: You've been invited to review examples of AI responses in this queue and share your feedback.
getStartedView.allItemsProcessed: All items in this annotation queue have already been processed and do not require additional annotation.
getStartedView.feedbackOptionsDescription: Here are the types of feedback you can give when reviewing responses, along with the possible values for each.

returnToAnnotationQueue.unsavedChangesDescription: You have unsaved changes to your annotations. If you leave now, your changes will be lost.

noDataView.unableToLoadAnnotationQueue: Unable to load annotation queue. The queue may not exist or you may not have access to it.
noDataView.checkQueueLinkOrContactAdmin: Please check the queue link or contact your administrator for access.
noDataView.unableToLoadItems: Unable to load items in this annotation queue. This is usually a temporary issue.
noDataView.tryAgainOrContactAdmin: Please try again. If the problem persists, contact your administrator.
noDataView.toBeginSmeEvaluation: To begin SME evaluation, please access this page through an annotation queue link.
